posts.author: Jente (Jente De Ridder)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have set up a number of custom fields in the Profile section of our users (department, start date at the company, birthday, their username in our ERP system, etc.

How can I reference these fields in a column?
I would like to be able to have a board with a User column and for example a “birthday” column that gets its value from the User profile applied to the User column.

Is this possible?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! So sorry for the late response!

Yes, this is absolutely possible! You will want to utilize monday’s Mirror Columns and Connect Boards Columns!

Here is where you can find some more information on these features:

  • https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360001733859-The-Mirror-Column

  • https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000635139-The-Connect-Boards-Column

If you have any questions about setting this up, shoot us an email at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to help with this!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
